intro.title: Welcome to Skill Sync
intro.description: Skill Sync keeps your agent skills consistent across every machine by syncing them through a GitHub repository.
intro.vaultDescription: You will create a GitHub repository to act as your private skill vault. Skill Sync uploads, downloads, and reconciles skills through it.
intro.privateHint: A private repository is recommended so your skills stay visible only to you.

nextSteps.selectRepository: Create or choose a vault repository
nextSteps.bind: Bind the vault and start syncing

onboarding.bindingRequired: Connect a Vault before entering Sync or Settings
onboarding.description: Connect one Vault repository (private recommended) through the GitHub App before entering the sync workspace.
onboarding.title: Initial Setup

github.adjustScope: This GitHub App installation is not limited to one vault repository. Adjust its scope and check again.
github.appNotConfiguredDescription: This release does not contain the public GitHub App client id / slug, so authorization cannot start.
github.appStillNotInstalled: The GitHub App is not installed yet. Install it on your vault repository, then check again.
github.authorizeDescription: Authorize Skill Sync with GitHub Device Flow. Complete verification in GitHub and the app will check the installation scope.
github.bindingFailed: Vault binding did not complete. Check the remote state and try again.
github.confirmRebind: I confirm switching Vaults and archiving the current local sync base
github.confirmRebindRequired: Confirm archiving the current local sync base before switching Vaults.
github.createRepositoryDescription: Create a new repository on GitHub to use as your skill vault. A private repository is recommended so your skills stay visible only to you.
github.deviceAuthorizationFailed: GitHub Device Flow did not complete. Start authorization again.
github.deviceCodeLabel: Enter this code on the GitHub verification page
github.deviceExpired: The device code expired. Start GitHub authorization again.
github.initializeCreatesCommit: This creates an initialization commit containing manifest.json in the target repository.
github.installDescription: When installing the GitHub App, select only the vault repository you just created, not all repositories. Then check the installation to continue.
github.invalidManifestDescription: The app will not overwrite an invalid manifest.json. Fix the repository contents and check again.
github.multipleRepositories: This installation contains {{count}} repositories. Limit it to one vault repository.
github.publicRepositoryDescription: {{repository}} is public. Its Skill files and Git history are visible to everyone and may be copied or cached. Continue only after confirming it contains no sensitive information.
github.rateLimited: GitHub API requests are rate limited. Try again later.
github.rateLimitedWithRetry: GitHub API requests are rate limited. Try again after {{retryAfter}}.
github.repositoryForbidden: This authorization cannot access the repository. Check the GitHub App repository scope.
github.repositoryMissing: The current Vault repository was not found. Check the GitHub App installation scope.
github.repositoryUnavailable: No usable vault repository is available.
github.selectionAll: This GitHub App installation grants access to all repositories. Limit it to one vault repository.
github.vaultStateChanged: The remote Vault state changed. Check and confirm it again.
github.vaultUnavailable: The Vault is currently unavailable. Check the repository, branch, and authorization.

sync.commitNone: No GitHub commit will be created

conflictReason.local_deleted_remote_changed: Local was deleted, but remote changed
conflictReason.remote_deleted_local_changed: Remote was deleted, but local changed
conflictReason.same_name_first_seen: Local and remote differed on first discovery

deleteGuard.description: This plan contains many deletions. Confirm that the skill roots are readable and the deletions are expected.
deleteGuard.title: Unusually many deletions

sync.description: Review all planned changes before syncing.
sync.emptyAllSyncedDescription: All skills are up to date; no pending changes.
sync.emptyDescription: Adjust the search or status filter and try again.
sync.localBaseOnly: Only the local sync base will be saved; no GitHub commit will be created
sync.notConfigured: No sync repository configured. Please complete setup first.
sync.recoveryRequired: Sync recovery is required before continuing

settings.disconnectConfirm: Disconnecting GitHub clears local authorization and archives the local base, but does not uninstall the GitHub App or delete remote content. Continue?
settings.githubVaultReadOnly: GitHub identity and Vault binding are shown read-only.
settings.ignore: Ignore rules (one per line; matched files are excluded from change comparison)
settings.ignoreDescription: Ignore rules affect skill packing, hashes, sizes, and sync status.
settings.limitsDescription: The compressed limit caps uploaded blobs; file, single-file, and total unpacked limits protect local packing and remote extraction.
settings.singleLimitTooLarge: The single-file unpacked limit cannot exceed the total unpacked limit per Skill.
settings.skillRootsReadOnly: Directories are defined by the corresponding tools and are read-only; project-level directories are outside V1.
settings.supportProjectDescription: If Skill Sync is useful to you, you can support the project with a Star on GitHub.
